use.flag: Enable kernel audit-based process monitoring (requires AUDIT kernel support)
Enable eBPF-based process monitoring (requires BPF kernel support)

pkgmetadata.longdescription: OpenSnitch is a GNU/Linux interactive application firewall inspired by Little Snitch. It intercepts outbound connections and prompts the user to allow or deny them. Rules can be based on process, port, user, destination IP/host, or a combination of these. The daemon (opensnitchd) is written in Go and uses netfilter queues. The UI (opensnitch-ui) is a Python/PyQt6 application that provides a graphical interface for managing connections and rules.
